{@io.quarkiverse.roq.frontmatter.runtime.model.NormalPage page}
# {site.title}

{#if site.description}
> {site.description}

{/if}
{#for collection in site.collections.list}
{#if !collection.hidden && !collection.derived}
## {collection.id.capitalizeFirst}

{#for doc in collection}
{#if doc.llmstxt}
### [{doc.title}]({doc.url.path})

{doc.plainContent}

{/if}
{/for}
{/if}
{/for}
## Pages

{#for p in site.pages}
{#if p.source.isTargetHtml && p.llmstxt && !p.source.isSiteIndex}
### [{p.title}]({p.url.path})

{p.plainContent}

{/if}
{/for}
